🇫🇷 Pharos — internet-signalement.gouv.fr 📞 3020 — Enfance en danger (France) 📞 116 000 — Child Focus (Belgique) 🌍 NCMEC — missingkids.org 🌍 Interpol — Crimes contre enfants

Historique

Les 0 derniers échanges sont mémorisés et injectés dans le contexte de l'assistant à chaque session.

Mes habitudes
Mes challenges
Résultats du mode accident créatif
Générez une image pour voir les anomalies détectées.
// ─── TRACKER UI Functions ────────────────────────── function addHabit() { const name = document.getElementById('newHabitName').value.trim(); const unit = document.getElementById('newHabitUnit').value.trim(); const goal = document.getElementById('newHabitGoal').value; if (!name) return; TRACKER.addHabit(name, 'count', parseFloat(goal) || 0, unit); document.getElementById('newHabitName').value = ''; document.getElementById('newHabitUnit').value = ''; document.getElementById('newHabitGoal').value = ''; renderHabits(); speak('Habitude ajoutée : ' + name); } function addChallenge() { const name = document.getElementById('newChallengeName').value.trim(); const desc = document.getElementById('newChallengeDesc').value.trim(); const days = parseInt(document.getElementById('newChallengeDays').value) || 30; const target = parseFloat(document.getElementById('newChallengeTarget').value) || 100; const unit = document.getElementById('newChallengeUnit').value.trim(); if (!name) return; TRACKER.addChallenge(name, desc, days, target, unit); document.getElementById('newChallengeName').value = ''; document.getElementById('newChallengeDesc').value = ''; document.getElementById('newChallengeDays').value = ''; document.getElementById('newChallengeTarget').value = ''; document.getElementById('newChallengeUnit').value = ''; renderChallenges(); speak('Challenge créé : ' + name); } function renderHabits() { const d = TRACKER.get(); const el = document.getElementById('habitsList'); if (!el) return; if (!d.habits.length) { el.innerHTML = '

Aucune habitude suivie. Ajoutez-en une ci-dessous.

'; return; } el.innerHTML = d.habits.filter(h => h.active).map(h => { const stats = TRACKER.getStats(h.id, 7); return `
${h.name} ${stats.count} fois cette semaine
`; }).join(''); } function logHabit(id) { const val = document.getElementById('log_' + id)?.value; if (!val) return; const msg = TRACKER.logEntry(id, val); if (msg) { addChatMsg('assistant', msg); speak(msg); } document.getElementById('log_' + id).value = ''; renderHabits(); } function renderChallenges() { const d = TRACKER.get(); const el = document.getElementById('challengesList'); if (!el) return; if (!d.challenges.length) { el.innerHTML = '

Aucun challenge en cours. Créez-en un ci-dessous.

'; return; } el.innerHTML = d.challenges.filter(c => c.active).map(c => { const prog = TRACKER.getChallengeProgress(c.id); return `
${c.name} ${prog?.pct || 0}% — ${prog?.daysLeft || 0}j restants
`; }).join(''); } function logChallengeEntry(id) { const val = document.getElementById('logc_' + id)?.value; if (!val) return; const msg = TRACKER.logChallenge(id, val); if (msg) { addChatMsg('assistant', msg); speak(msg); } document.getElementById('logc_' + id).value = ''; renderChallenges(); } // Détecter détresse dans le chat const _origSendChat = sendChat; window.sendChat = async function() { const text = document.getElementById('chatInput').value.trim(); const distress = TRACKER.checkDistress(text); if (distress !== 'ok') { const response = TRACKER.getDistressResponse(distress); addChatMsg('user', text); document.getElementById('chatInput').value = ''; addChatMsg('assistant', response); speak(response); MEM.addToHistory('user', text); MEM.addToHistory('assistant', response); return; } await _origSendChat(); }; // Analyser anomalies après génération async function analyzeAndShowAnomalies(imageUrl) { const claudeKey = getKey('claudeKey'); if (!claudeKey || !imageUrl) return; const el = document.getElementById('anomalyResults'); if (el) el.innerHTML = '⟳ Analyse des anomalies en cours…'; const anomalies = await TRACKER.detectAnomalies(imageUrl, claudeKey); if (el) { const html = TRACKER.renderAnomalyUI(anomalies); el.innerHTML = html || 'Aucune anomalie détectée — rendu propre.'; } } // Initialiser le tracker window.addEventListener('load', () => { setTimeout(() => { renderHabits(); renderChallenges(); }, 1000); }); // Panels update const _origShowPanel = showPanel; window.showPanel = function(id) { _origShowPanel(id); if (id === 'tracker') { renderHabits(); renderChallenges(); } }; // Nav tabs update for tracker // DISABLED: document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach((tab, i) => { const panels = ['compose','assistant','layout','writing','video','profile','tracker']; tab.onclick = () => showPanel(panels[i] || 'compose'); }); // ─── Colorize UI functions ───────────────────────── function quickColorFix(type) { const src = resultUrl || baseDataUrl; if (!src) { showSt('error', 'Aucune image à retoucher'); return; } const img = new Image(); img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous'; img.onload = () => { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = img.width; canvas.height = img.height; canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img, 0, 0); COLORIZE.quickFix(canvas, type); const newUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); resultUrl = newUrl; document.getElementById('resImg').src = newUrl; showSt('success', '✓ Retouche appliquée'); speak('Retouche appliquée.'); }; img.src = src; } function startColorVoice() { const src = resultUrl || baseDataUrl; if (!src) { showSt('error', 'Aucune image à retoucher'); return; } const btn = document.getElementById('colorVoiceBtn'); const resultEl = document.getElementById('colorVoiceResult'); btn.classList.add('rec'); btn.textContent = '⏹ Arrêter'; resultEl.style.display = 'block'; resultEl.textContent = '🎙 Dictez votre retouche…'; const img = new Image(); img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous'; img.onload = () => { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = img.width; canvas.height = img.height; canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img, 0, 0); COLORIZE.startVoiceCorrection(canvas, async (result, command) => { btn.classList.remove('rec'); btn.textContent = '🎙 Dicter une retouche'; resultEl.textContent = `"${command}" — appliqué`; const newUrl = result.toDataURL('image/png'); resultUrl = newUrl; document.getElementById('resImg').src = newUrl; showSt('success', '✓ Retouche vocale appliquée'); speak('Retouche appliquée selon votre description.'); }); }; img.src = src; } // ─── Settings panel init ────────────────────────── const _origShowPanelFull = window.showPanel; window.showPanel = function(id) { _origShowPanelFull(id); if (id === 'settings') { document.getElementById('settingsContent').innerHTML = SETTINGS.renderPanel(); } }; // Nav tabs — update for 8 panels const allPanels = ['compose','assistant','layout','writing','video','profile','tracker','settings']; // DISABLED: document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach((tab, i) => { if (allPanels[i]) tab.onclick = () => showPanel(allPanels[i]); }); // ─── Collab panel init ──────────────────────────── const _origShowPanelCollab = window.showPanel; window.showPanel = function(id) { _origShowPanelCollab(id); if (id === 'collab') { document.getElementById('collabContent').innerHTML = COLLAB.renderPanel(); } }; // ─── Export checklist ───────────────────────────── function showExportChecklist() { const checklist = ANALYTICS.buildChecklist({ videoUrl: window.videoBlob ? true : false, musicUrl: window.soundIntroUrl || window.soundOutroUrl, caption: localStorage.getItem('moe_last_caption') || '', cta: 'Likez et partagez si ça vous parle 💛', bioLink: MEM.getProfile().bioLink || '', }); ANALYTICS.renderChecklist(checklist); } // ─── Algorithm watch ────────────────────────────── async function checkAlgorithms() { const claudeKey = getKey('claudeKey'); if (!claudeKey) { showSt('error', 'Clé Claude manquante'); return; } addChatMsg('assistant', '🔍 Recherche des dernières mises à jour algorithmes…'); const result = await ANALYTICS.checkAlgorithmUpdates(claudeKey); if (result) { addChatMsg('assistant', result); speak('Voici les dernières informations sur les algorithmes.'); } showPanel('assistant'); } // ─── Physics check avant génération ────────────── const _origGenerate = window.generate; window.generate = async function() { const prompt = buildPrompt(); const issues = PHYSICS.checkBasicPhysics(prompt); if (issues.length > 0) { issues.forEach(issue => addChatMsg('assistant', '⚠ ' + issue)); } await _origGenerate(); // Analyser anomalies après génération if (window.resultUrl && window.TRACKER) { setTimeout(() => analyzeAndShowAnomalies(window.resultUrl), 1000); } }; // ─── Nav tabs update for all panels ────────────── const allPanelsFull = ['compose','assistant','layout','writing','video','profile','tracker','settings','collab']; // DISABLED: document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach((tab, i) => { if (allPanelsFull[i]) tab.onclick = () => showPanel(allPanelsFull[i]); }); // Finance panel init const _origShowPanelFin = window.showPanel; window.showPanel = function(id) { _origShowPanelFin(id); if (id === 'finance') { document.getElementById('financeContent').innerHTML = FINANCE.renderBilan(); } }; // Update nav tabs for all panels const allPanelsFinal = ['compose','assistant','layout','writing','video','profile','tracker','settings','collab','finance']; // DISABLED: document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach((tab, i) => { if (allPanelsFinal[i]) tab.onclick = () => showPanel(allPanelsFinal[i]); }); // Add cultural badge to video export const _origExportVideo = window.exportVideo; if (_origExportVideo) { window.exportVideo = async function() { await _origExportVideo(); // Apply cultural badge if needed const prompt = buildPrompt(); const elements = CULTURAL_BADGE.detectCulturalElements(prompt); if (elements.length > 0) { const badge = await CULTURAL_BADGE.generateBadge(elements, null, getKey('claudeKey')); // Badge is integrated via watermark metadata if (window.addChatMsg) addChatMsg('assistant', `✦ Pastille culturelle intégrée automatiquement — ${elements.map(e => e.culture).join(', ')}`); } }; }
